title: Dungeon's Delight
description: Dungeons Delight is a mod for Minecraft that adds the cooking and consumption of monsters.
body:
# ![Banner for Dungeon's Delight. Contains a cloud of green smoke coming from a cooking pot with the text "Dungeon's Delight" overhead.](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/descriptions/dd_banner.png)

![A blue banner with a pink trimming reading "About"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/icon/banner_about.png)

Dungeon's Delight is an addon to the popular Minecraft mod Farmer’s Delight which aims to introduce new content in the farming and cooking aspects of the game.
Dungeon's Delight expands on Farmer’s Delight with the ability to cook and monsters and earn various new status effects from them.

[![Farmer's Delight logo with the text "Requires Farmer's Delight"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/descriptions/dd_requires_fd.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)
[![Goopy purple text reading "Requires RunicLib"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/descriptions/dd_requires_rl.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/runiclib)

_Feel free to include this project in modpacks!_

![A blue banner with a pink trimming used to divide the description](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/icon/banner_header.png)

# ![Banner reading the word "Features".](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/descriptions/dd_features.png)

## 🍲Monster Cooking🍲
Dungeon's Delight features a new crafting station known as the **Monster Pot**. The **Monster Pot** acts very similar to the Cooking Pot found in Farmer's Delight but must be heated by spawner-like blocks and can create new foods known as **Monster Foods** that of which all grant special new effects!

## 🔮Monster Effects🔮
Dungeon's Delight features a new alternative effect type to existing effects known as **Monster Effects**. **Monster Effects** are mutually exclusive with their normal counterparts meaning if the user tries to attain both versions of an effect the normal one will become "**monsterized**" and turned into the monster variant. **Monster Effects** keep the themeing of the original effect but flip it on it's head!

## 🔪Misc Features🔪
Dungeon's Delight features some extra side features such as the **Cleaver**, a new alternative to the knife which can be thrown or **Rotbulbs**, a new crop that must be grown in dark locations.

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than BisectHosting. **New customers can use code "Yirmiri" to get 25% off their first month**, 
and their support team is always available to assist you in any way they can.

### Mod Integration & Compatibility

Dungeon's Delight plans to feature expansive compatibility with other mods to allow the user to continue eating on the go for whatever adventures they take! Currently Dungeon's Delight features compatibility for:

- [JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) - Displays Monster Cooking recipes and Embedded Eggs process.
- [Aether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether) - New foods, knife drops from mobs, and new cleavers!
- [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) - New foods, knife drops from mobs, and new cleavers!
- [Miner's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/miners-delight-plus) - Copper cup variants
- [Yapping Tooltips](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yapping-tooltips) - Yapping tooltips for all items!
- [Appledog](https://modrinth.com/mod/appledog) - New foods.

This list does not count mods adding integration on their end! Integration for more mods may be considered in the future.

![A blue banner with a pink trimming reading "Azurune Projects"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/icon/banner_projects.png)

![A blue banner with a pink trimming reading "Frequently Asked Questions"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/icon/banner_faq.png)

**Q:** I have an issue/bug I want to report, where can I do that?
- **A:** You can leave bug reports on the [GitHub page](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Dungeons-Delight/issues). Please be sure to see to both see if someone else has reported the same issue to avoid duplicates and to use proper tags when possible.
  

**Q:** I have a suggestion for the project, where can I leave it?
- **A:** You can leave suggestions for the project in [our Discord server](https://discord.gg/jmHpajd) or the [GitHub page](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Dungeons-Delight/issues), please make sure to follow the guidelines for posts/issues and use proper tags when possible.


**Q:** Will there be a port to **X** version?
- **A:** I do not have any plans to port to any older versions of Minecraft, as for newer versions of the game I will probably be sticking to the biggest modding version at a given time since that will be the version I will be playing the game on.

![A blue banner with a pink trimming reading "Credits"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/icon/banner_credits.png)

This section is dedicated to those that contributed to the content of the mod as this project wouldn't have been as easy or possible if it weren't for the help of these talented people!

## [Artyrian](https://bsky.app/profile/artyrian.bsky.social):
- Helped with custom splash texts and custom rarities on 1.21.1+.

## [Hecco](https://twitter.com/Hecco):
- Artist behind Wormwood Planks, Living Torch, and Living Candle.
- Programmer behind Wormroot worldgen and additionally Wormroot Stalk block functionality and effect borders are originally from [Bountiful Fares](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful-fares) (with permission from the original author).

## [SlimeSlabs](https://bsky.app/profile/slimeslabs.bsky.social):
- Artist behind new Living Fire texture for mod versions 1.2.3+
